text:
(a) The term of a branch pilot commission is four years.

(b) If the pilot board of a navigation district dismisses a branch pilot from service, the branch pilot’s commission expires.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.044 — Term of Branch Pilot License

(a) The term of a branch pilot commission is four years.

(b) If the pilot board of a navigation district dismisses a branch pilot from service, the branch pilot’s commission expires.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The term of a branch pilot commission is four years.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the pilot board of a navigation district dismisses a branch pilot from service, the branch pilot’s commission expires.
